name: aidelink-handoff
description: Build compact, verifiable ChatGPT-to-Codex handoff packages and safe local task deep links.

interface.longDescription: Preview and validate an eight-field handoff, generate UTF-8-safe Codex task links, report URL lengths, and keep a copy fallback without sending anything automatically.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create a compact AideLink handoff for a new Codex task and show me the preview before I open it.
